scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server"
scripts.preview:live: concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server" "npm run dev:full -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.desktop:full: concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w @nexusforge/server
